phases: Phase 1: Prompt-injection canary doctrine + audit pass
Phase 2: Cedar policy + audit gate artifact wiring
Phase 3: Path canonicalization (DRIFT-1, DRIFT-2) + intent-lock regex tightening (LOW-4)
Phase 4: Self-application — run new audit pass against this plan
open_questions: Canary catalog source-of-truth: doctrine-only / Python module / YAML data file
Audit-pass positioning: before OWASP / Step 0.6 / parallel in Step 2
DRIFT-2 scope: known sites only / full skill-tree sweep

limitations: Canary is regex-pattern-based, not semantic; sophisticated obfuscation will not be caught.
Defense at audit layer; operator override of /qor-audit bypasses the canary.
LOW-4 regex tightening local to intent_lock.py:51 only.
non_goals: LLM02/05/06/07/08 mitigations (each scheduled own sprint phase)
EU AI Act Art 13/50 machine-readable provenance metadata (Phase 54)
AI Act + AI RMF doctrine files (Phase 54)
exclusions: Retroactive scan of historical plan/audit/ledger content
